{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Crimson Vault's domination seed
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A seed of the [[Crimson Vault]]'s domination is a vile and disgusting object that cannot be attuned to them.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Crimson Vault's domination seed]] cannot be attuned to [[the Nye]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
